description: Weekly Changelog discussing updates in Solana development, including SIMD changes, new tools, and program SDK plans.
topic_summary: Highlights include SIMD163 changes [t=12:80], introduction of the hash cache tool [t=57:52], removal of the vote buffer [t=74:18], and a new program SDK plan [t=114:03]. Resource of the week is Lucid for local program development [t=177:86].
